Okay, so the set, the opening of the set is probably the most important part because you're setting the tone for the entire conversation that you're about to have. So if you get on the phone and you sound like unintentional, then they get that. So you need to sound very purposeful with what you're saying. So this is kind of how it should go. You know, you call them up and then they answer and you say, hi, Jen. And then they're like, yes, this is Jen. And then you're like, hi, this is Layla from Body Transformation. And then you let them respond and they're like, oh, hey, I'm like, yeah, how's it going? And like the first thing you want to do is to break down your wall a little bit. So that's why you're really friendly. Okay, like very friendly. So you make a little small thought. Be like, oh, so like, are you from this area? Did you just move here? Like, how'd you just hear about us? Like, you know, you live around the area and then, you know, find something kind of like, oh yeah, my kids go to school down the street. Oh, cool. Like my kids go to that school too or like whatever. Identify something that you have with them that is similar. So that's the biggest thing is you want to get them to say something and then you can be like, oh, me too, on anything. And then be like, okay, so anyways, let's get started. You know, I have 30 minutes set aside for this call and I really just want to make sure at the end of the call that you have gotten the clarity and the value that you are looking for. Is that okay? And then you wait for them to say yes. Okay. And then you go ahead and say, so I have a few questions for you. It might sound like I'm kind of interrogating you, but honestly, I just really want to get to know you early on to understand like, if you're the kind of person that this program is going to work for. And if what you have is something that we can, you know, help with. So if that all sounds good, then at the end, if you're a good fit, I'll go ahead and kind of tell you how we get started. Does that sound okay? And they'll say yes. And then go to the next part of the second.
